questionEdit.editedStem: REAL011 修订后题干：已调整题干、分值、难度和来源框。

rollback: delete from review_queue_items where payload->>'questionItemId' = 'b2da5e54-c75e-40b1-8321-d3da0d83fdff' or payload->>'sourceRegionId' = '1a775385-9001-4b32-95b2-d17013f2e5a5'; delete from question_blocks where question_item_id = 'b2da5e54-c75e-40b1-8321-d3da0d83fdff'; delete from question_items where id = 'b2da5e54-c75e-40b1-8321-d3da0d83fdff';
summaryChinese: 题干、答案、解析、题型、分值、难度和 SourceRegion bbox 均可修订，且题目与来源框修订都有 audit。
